add_subdirectory(libconfig)
add_subdirectory(mt19937ar)
add_subdirectory(multipart-parser)
if(WITH_HTTP_PARSER STREQUAL "http-parser")
  add_subdirectory(http-parser)
else()
  add_subdirectory(llhttp)
endif()
